description: Add responsive mobile cards to all gestionnaire navigators. Desktop shows table (>=768px), mobile shows compact cards (<768px). Automatic CSS breakpoint switching, no manual toggle. Same dual-render pattern for all roles.

userStories.title: InterventionCardMobile + dual render in InterventionsViewContainer
userStories.description: Create compact mobile card component for interventions. Add dual render in InterventionsViewContainer.renderListView() — table hidden on mobile, cards hidden on desktop.
acceptanceCriteria: InterventionCardMobile shows: priority indicator, title, location, status badge, relative date
Tap on card navigates to intervention detail (role-aware URL)
InterventionsViewContainer.renderListView() uses dual render: block md:hidden for cards, hidden md:block for table
Cards receive same paginatedItems as table (pagination shared)
Works for all 3 roles (gestionnaire, prestataire, locataire)
Lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: Created intervention-card-mobile.tsx (compact 3-line card). Dual render in InterventionsViewContainer.renderListView() — block md:hidden for cards, hidden md:block for table. Shared paginatedItems. Works for all 3 roles.

userStories.title: Building/Lot mobile cards + dual render in PatrimoineNavigator
userStories.description: Create compact mobile cards for buildings and lots. Add dual render in PatrimoineNavigator for both tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: BuildingCardMobile shows: name, address, lots count, occupancy rate
LotCardMobile shows: reference, building name, surface, tenant status
Tap navigates to building/lot detail page
PatrimoineNavigator renders cards on mobile, DataTable on desktop for both tabs
Lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: Created building-card-mobile.tsx (name + address + lots count + occupancy%) and lot-card-mobile.tsx (reference + building + surface + tenant + occupied badge). Dual render in both renderBuildingsContent() and renderLotsContent(). Lot cards respect lockedLotIds.

userStories.title: ContactCardMobile + dual render in ContactsNavigator
userStories.description: Create compact mobile card for contacts. Add dual render in ContactsNavigator.renderContent().
acceptanceCriteria: ContactCardMobile shows: avatar/initials, name, role, contact info, invitation status badge
Tap navigates to contact detail page
Dual render works for all 3 tabs (contacts, invitations, companies)
Lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: Created contact-card-mobile.tsx with 3 exports: ContactCardMobile (initials avatar + name + role + invitation status), InvitationCardMobile (mail icon + name/email + status), CompanyCardMobile (building icon + name + VAT + location). Dual render in renderContent() using renderMobileCards() switch on activeTab.

userStories.title: ContractCardMobile + dual render in ContractsNavigator
userStories.description: Create compact mobile card for contracts. Add dual render in ContractsNavigator content area.
acceptanceCriteria: ContractCardMobile shows: title, lot reference, date range, status badge
Tap navigates to contract detail page
Dual render works for all contract tabs (tous, actifs, a_venir, etc.)
Lint passes on all modified files
userStories.notes: Created contract-card-mobile.tsx (FileText icon + title + lot/building + date range + status badge). Dual render wrapping ContractsListView in hidden md:block, cards in block md:hidden.
